title: Prompt Injection, Tool Output Trust, Exfiltration, and Safe Rendering · Behavior Case: Direct Indirect Injection
summary: Retrieved text claims to be system instructions, a tool result requests secrets, the agent follows embedded links, approval text is forged, and model Markdown reaches an unsafe renderer. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the direct indirect injection increment in instruction-data separation and agent security gateway. Learners progres…
objectives: Test direct and indirect goal hijacking, authority spoofing, hidden text, encoded payloads, multimodal instructions, and tool-result injection.
Represent application policy, user instructions, retrieved data, tool output, memory, and provider metadata with explicit authority and non-executable boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example agent engineering team handles case 7747 during a multilingual case-routing evaluation. Build deterministic Python evidence to separate instructions from data, resist direct and indirect injection, constrain tools, prevent exfiltration, and encode rendered output; telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable; then change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Test direct and indirect goal hijacking, authority spoofing, hidden text, encoded payloads, multimodal instructions, and tool-result injection. A defensible solution applies Direct Indirect Injection, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to instruction-data separation and agent security gateway.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-injection-output-security-5
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-injection-output-security-5.
# Case 9036: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def worked_agentpy_injection_output_security_5(untrusted_inputs: int = 40, rejected_instructions: int = 18, admitted_data: int = 22, exfiltration_events: int = 0, unsafe_renderings: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorityworked5",
        "interaction9036",
        "tool5dekrow",
        "stateworked59036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if untrusted_inputs < 1 or rejected_instructions < 0 or admitted_data < 0:
        return False, untrusted_inputs, "security-input-count"
    if rejected_instructions + admitted_data != untrusted_inputs:
        return False, rejected_instructions, "instruction-data-reconciliation"
    if exfiltration_events > 0:
        return False, exfiltration_events, "data-exfiltration"
    if unsafe_renderings > 0:
        return False, unsafe_renderings, "unsafe-output-rendering"
    assert rejected_instructions + admitted_data == untrusted_inputs and exfiltration_events == 0
    return True, rejected_instructions, "secured-agent-boundary"
content.caption: Runnable deterministic fixed-fixture pure-Python agent decision model; trace one accepted and one rejected model, interaction, schema, tool, authority, state, approval, memory, evaluation, security, telemetry, sandbox, deployment, or recovery case, then state which provider, Gemini, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, identity, storage, browser, accessibility, privacy, load, cost, or production claim still needs controlled transfer evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-direct-indirect-injection-1n9umm
# Competency: agentpy-direct-indirect-injection.
# Case 2222: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def evidence_agentpy_direct_indirect_injection_1n9umm(untrusted_inputs: int = 40, rejected_instructions: int = 18, admitted_data: int = 22, exfiltration_events: int = 0, unsafe_renderings: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1n9umm = "1n9umm-mmu9n1-2222"
    assert evidence_variant_1n9umm
    evidence_axes_1n9umm = (
        "authority1n9umm",
        "interaction2222",
        "toolmmu9n1",
        "state1n9umm2222",
        "evaluation22221n9umm",
        "recoverymmu9n12222",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1n9umm)) == 6
    if untrusted_inputs < 1 or rejected_instructions < 0 or admitted_data < 0:
        return False, untrusted_inputs, "security-input-count"
    if rejected_instructions + admitted_data != untrusted_inputs:
        return False, rejected_instructions, "instruction-data-reconciliation"
    if exfiltration_events > 0:
        return False, exfiltration_events, "data-exfiltration"
    if unsafe_renderings > 0:
        return False, unsafe_renderings, "unsafe-output-rendering"
    assert rejected_instructions + admitted_data == untrusted_inputs and exfiltration_events == 0
    return True, rejected_instructions, "secured-agent-boundary"
